  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo Ugguns iṣgahje no ta taks fivehtas Weetas ahra RSA/ un aprihje us to Al-
to Dedsamit-llppuri un tohs
nkus/ kad wiſſi Laudis to re-
a/ gawileja tee/ un kritte us
eem Waigeem."
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta X. Nodalla.
bē un Abijus Aārona Dehli neß fweschu
uni preeſsch to KUNGU : 1. Un tohp
agguni nomaitati : 2. Mohsus peekoh-
a Aāronam par to ne behdatees : 6.
ns un ſiprs Dsehreens tohp teem Pree-
eem aielegts/ famehr teem jwehta Weeta
hw : 8. Weena UppuruDatta tohp
neem nospreesia : 12. Mohsus apſtai-
pahr to Noseedſſbas.Uppura Mhsi : 16.
tohp atkal us Aārona Aisbildinaschanu
Neeru : 19/ 20."
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N Aārona Dehli Na-
dabs un Abtjus nehme
ikweens favu Wihraka-
ku/ un likke Ugguni eekſch
an likke Rwehpja-Sahleſtur
a/ un neffe jweschnu Ugguni
NGA Preekſchā/to winsch
ne bij pawehlejs.
Tad iṣgahje Ugguns no ta
RSA/ un aprihje tohs/ un
omirre preeſsch ta KUNGA.
Un Mohsus fazzija us A-
n : Tas irr tas/ ko tas Klungs
nnajs/ fazzidams : Eekſch
kas tuwu pee man nahk/
hu es fivehtihts / un wiſſu
chu Preekſchā tapschn es
inahts.- Bet Aārons zeete
n."
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Mohsus aizinaja Mih-
un Elzapanu/ Uhiēla Aāro-
lehwa Brahta Dehlus / un
iaus teem : Pee-eite/ un neſ-
juhfus Brahtus nohst no"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "preeſsch Lehgera."
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad peegahje tee/ un neffe
tohs ar winnit fchaureemSwahr-
keem ahra preeſsch Lehgera/ ittin
ka Mohsus hij runnajs."
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Mohsus fazzija us A-
ironu / un Eleazaru / un Ihta-
maru winna Dehleem: Jums ne
buhs juhfas Galivas atſegt /
nede juhfas Drehbes japlohsfibt /
ka juhs ne mirſtat/ un ta Duſini-
ba pahr wiſfu to Drandst nahk/
bet juhſeim Brahteem wiſam
Israēta Namnam buhs scho llg-
guns-Sohdibu apraudaht/ ko tas
KUNGS eededsinajs."
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jums arri ne buhs no tahs
Sa-eefchanas Telts Durwin is-
eet / ka juhs ne mirſtat / jo ta
KUNGA Swaidifchanas Etje
irr us jums/un tee darrija pehz
Mohsus Wahrdn."
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS runnaja
us Aironu/ un fazzija:"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiḥnu un ſipru Dsehree-
nu teiv ne buhs dsert/ tew un ta-
weem Dehleem ar teiv/ kad juhs
eekſch tahs Sa-eefchanas Telts
ejat/ ka juhs ne mirſtat / tas lai
irr weens Likkums pee juhſeem
Pehznahkameein muhschain."
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka juhs warrat noschkirt
to fwehtu no ta nefwehta / un to
neschkifstu no ta fcheifsta."
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ka juhs warrat teem
Israēta Behrneem mahziht wi-
fus Likkums/ ko tas KUNG-
us teem irr runnajs zaar Mohsu"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
